content.title: Fire Pits
content.tagline: Timeless Warmth. Built to Gather. Designed to Last.

content.title: Timeless Warmth. Built to Gather. Designed to Last.
content.subtitle: A paver fire pit transforms your outdoor space into a natural gathering point — a place where warmth, conversation, and design come together. More than a seasonal feature, a professionally built fire pit becomes the heart of your patio, extending outdoor living well beyond sunset and cooler months.
content.paragraph1: At Maxima, we design and build custom paver fire pits that combine lasting structure, refined aesthetics, and everyday safety — tailored to your space, your style, and how you gather.

content.title: Why Choose a Paver Fire Pit?

items.text: Withstands Ohio’s changing seasons without cracking, fading, or warping.

benefits.title: Built for  Stability & Safety
benefits.description: Paver fire pits sit on a properly prepared base, eliminating uneven ground, shifting stones, or instability. This creates a safer environment for family and guests while containing fire in a controlled, durable structure.

items.text: Just an occasional rinse to keep it clean and pristine.

benefits.title: Designed to Withstand  the Elements
benefits.description: High-quality concrete pavers resist heat, moisture, and freeze-thaw cycles — making them ideal for Central Ohio’s changing seasons. No warping, rusting, or premature wear.

items.text: Choose from multiple textures, colors, and finishes to suit your home’s style.

benefits.title: Low Maintenance, Long-Term Value
benefits.description: Non-porous pavers are easy to clean and maintain. Occasional sweeping and simple upkeep keep your fire pit looking pristine year after year.

items.text:
From rustic earth tones to modern charcoal and gray blends, paver fire pits integrate seamlessly with:

- Paver patios
- Outdoor kitchens
- Seating walls
- Walkways and steps

They can be circular, square, or custom-shaped to match your outdoor layout.

benefits.title: Aesthetic Versatility
benefits.description:
From rustic earth tones to modern charcoal and gray blends, paver fire pits integrate seamlessly with:

 • Paver patios
 • Outdoor kitchens
 • Seating walls
 • Walkways and steps

They can be circular, square, or custom-shaped to match your outdoor layout.

content.description: Unlike temporary fire rings or metal pits, a paver fire pit offers permanence, stability, and visual impact. Built with precision and premium materials, it elevates both form and function.

items.answer: Yes. When built correctly on a stable base with proper materials, paver fire pits offer excellent safety and structural reliability.
items.question: Are paver fire pits safe?

items.answer: Both work well. Wood offers a traditional experience, while gas provides convenience and cleaner operation. We help you choose the best option for your space.
items.question: Wood-burning or gas — which is better?

items.answer: Minimal maintenance is required. Occasional cleaning and inspection keep the surface and structure in excellent condition.
items.question: Do paver fire pits require maintenance?

items.answer: In many cases, yes. We assess your current patio and integrate the fire pit seamlessly.
items.question: Can a fire pit be added to an existing patio?
